item.title: When a Semi Truck Needs a Helping Hand
item.description: A semi truck recovery in the field, showing the towing and rescue process as heavy equipment is used to get the vehicle moving again. What would you want to see next in a recovery operation?

media:content.media:title: When a Semi Truck Needs a Helping Hand
media:content.media:description: A semi truck recovery in the field, showing the towing and rescue process as heavy equipment is used to get the vehicle moving again. What would you want to see next in a recovery operation?

item.title: Heavy Recovery After a Nighttime Accident
item.description: A challenging recovery operation unfolds after a nighttime accident, requiring precision, coordination, and careful lighting to safely clear the scene. What happened when visibility was at its lowest?

media:content.media:title: Heavy Recovery After a Nighttime Accident
media:content.media:description: A challenging recovery operation unfolds after a nighttime accident, requiring precision, coordination, and careful lighting to safely clear the scene. What happened when visibility was at its lowest?

item.title: Silverado Recovery From a Ditch
item.description: A ditch recovery operation brings a stranded Silverado back onto solid ground through careful pulling and stabilization. How much damage was avoided during the recovery?

media:content.media:title: Silverado Recovery From a Ditch
media:content.media:description: A ditch recovery operation brings a stranded Silverado back onto solid ground through careful pulling and stabilization. How much damage was avoided during the recovery?

item.title: Loaded Trailer Dropped Off Fifth Wheel
item.description: A loaded trailer separates unexpectedly from its fifth wheel connection, creating a serious recovery situation. What caused the failure?

media:content.media:title: Loaded Trailer Dropped Off Fifth Wheel
media:content.media:description: A loaded trailer separates unexpectedly from its fifth wheel connection, creating a serious recovery situation. What caused the failure?

item.title: Towing a Silverado Out of a Ditch
item.description: A Chevrolet Silverado is carefully pulled out of a ditch using recovery equipment and controlled tension. What caused the slide-off?

media:content.media:title: Towing a Silverado Out of a Ditch
media:content.media:description: A Chevrolet Silverado is carefully pulled out of a ditch using recovery equipment and controlled tension. What caused the slide-off?

item.title: Getting It Up on the Truck
item.description: A recovery crew works to load a difficult vehicle onto a tow truck using precise alignment and control. What makes this step so tricky?

media:content.media:title: Getting It Up on the Truck
media:content.media:description: A recovery crew works to load a difficult vehicle onto a tow truck using precise alignment and control. What makes this step so tricky?

item.title: Back on All Four Wheels: Vehicle Recovery
item.description: A flipped or stranded vehicle is carefully returned to its proper position during a controlled recovery operation. What’s the safest way to complete the roll-back?

media:content.media:title: Back on All Four Wheels: Vehicle Recovery
media:content.media:description: A flipped or stranded vehicle is carefully returned to its proper position during a controlled recovery operation. What’s the safest way to complete the roll-back?

item.title: Code 3 Call: Ford vs. Semi Recovery
item.description: A high-priority recovery call involves a Ford and a semi truck in a complex roadside situation. What led to the Code 3 response?

media:content.media:title: Code 3 Call: Ford vs. Semi Recovery
media:content.media:description: A high-priority recovery call involves a Ford and a semi truck in a complex roadside situation. What led to the Code 3 response?

item.title: Pulling a White Jeep Out of the Field
item.description: A stuck Jeep is recovered from a field using towing equipment and careful planning to avoid further damage. How did it end up off-road?

media:content.media:title: Pulling a White Jeep Out of the Field
media:content.media:description: A stuck Jeep is recovered from a field using towing equipment and careful planning to avoid further damage. How did it end up off-road?

item.title: School bus tow progress and recovery
item.description: A school bus recovery operation progresses step by step as crews carefully work to get it back on the road. What challenges slow the process down?

media:content.media:title: School bus tow progress and recovery
media:content.media:description: A school bus recovery operation progresses step by step as crews carefully work to get it back on the road. What challenges slow the process down?

item.title: New Chrysler Brush Cutter
item.description: A new Chrysler-branded brush cutter is introduced, showcasing its design and capability for clearing tough vegetation. What makes it effective in the field?

media:content.media:title: New Chrysler Brush Cutter
media:content.media:description: A new Chrysler-branded brush cutter is introduced, showcasing its design and capability for clearing tough vegetation. What makes it effective in the field?

item.title: When GPS Says Go, but the Road Says No!
item.description: A navigation mistake leads a vehicle into a road it can’t handle, turning a simple trip into a recovery situation. How did the route go so wrong?

media:content.media:title: When GPS Says Go, but the Road Says No!
media:content.media:description: A navigation mistake leads a vehicle into a road it can’t handle, turning a simple trip into a recovery situation. How did the route go so wrong?
